creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2011-08-14 01:32:13 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    databases/postgresql82-server/files patch-src-plperl-plperl 
    databases/postgresql83-server/files patch-src-plperl-plperl 
    databases/postgresql84-server/files patch-src-plperl-plperl 
    databases/postgresql90-server/files patch-src-plperl-plperl 
  Log:
  - Fix databases/p5-postgresql-plperl build with Perl 5.14
  
  This patch is for PostgreSQL 8.2, 8.3, 8.4 and 9.0.
  PostgreSQL 9.1 has it already.
  
  PR:             ports/158727
  Submitted by:   sunpoet (myself)
  Approved by:    girgen (maintainer timeout, 5 weeks)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/databases/postgresql82-server/files/patch-src-plperl-plperl (new)
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/databases/postgresql83-server/files/patch-src-plperl-plperl (new)
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/databases/postgresql84-server/files/patch-src-plperl-plperl (new)
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/databases/postgresql90-server/files/patch-src-plperl-plperl (new)
